title: Best of George: Only 3 days left to nominate a business!
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Nominate your favorite businesses in George and stand a chance to win some fantastic prizes from our generous sponsors.


> Tell us which businesses excel in their field, go the extra mile and uphold the good name of our beautiful region, so that they can be in the running for a Best of George Readers’ Choice Award when voting opens in June.


Each business that receives a nomination will be eligible for the coveted Best of George award in their respective category.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
